title: All AI global approval setup -- Claude Code + Codex one-shot
desc: Single reference to set up never-ask approval for all AI tools in WKAppBot environment. Run once on new machine or after reset. Covers: Claude Code, Codex CLI.
steps: CLAUDE CODE: edit <user-home>/.claude/settings.json. Set allow array to include Bash(*), PowerShell(*), Read(*), Write(*), Edit(*), Glob(*), Grep(*), WebFetch(*), WebSearch(*), mcp__wkappbot__wkappbot, mcp__wkappbot__wkappbot_cli, Bash(python *). Or use /update-config skill.
CLAUDE CODE CURRENT (2026-04-28): all core tools allowed globally. additionalDirectories: <user-home>/.claude. Special entries: PowerShell force-swap wkappbot-core, test-run-scenario cmd.
CODEX CLI: edit <user-home>/.codex/config.toml. Set ask_for_approval = 'never' to disable all prompts globally.
CODEX CURRENT (2026-04-28): model=gpt-5.4-mini, reasoning=medium, ask_for_approval=never. Trusted projects: C:\, <repo-root>, D:\GitHub\WkAutoQuant, D:\GitHub\personal-docs.
CODEX TRUST NEW REPO: add [projects.'D:\GitHub\RepoName'] trust_level = 'trusted' to ~/.codex/config.toml for each new project dir.
CODEX QUICK SETUP: codex config set ask_for_approval never (if CLI supports config subcommand), or manually edit config.toml.
VERIFY ALL: claude --version shows no approval prompts on tool use. codex exec -s workspace-write -C <repo-root> 'echo ok' completes without prompt.
author: claude
